title: Gallery Tour Balance: Maximize the Uniformity of Viewing-Station Spread
strategies: diagonal baseline: place the free stations equally spaced along the gallery's main diagonal (reproduces the checker baseline, scores ~0.1)
best-of-many-random: sample many independent random station layouts and keep the one with the largest combined d_min/d_max ratio

structured packing + hill climb: farthest-point insertion for a well-separated layout, then direct hill climbing on U = d_min/d_max with seeded shrinking perturbations, adapting to the fixed landmarks
invalid: emit stations outside the gallery / wrong count (scores 0)
